creator: sascha@root-login.org
text:
Just for the curious: I just reverted back to AWL as the bugs keep piling up.
Yesterday i hit https://bz.apache.org/SpamAssassin/show_bug.cgi?id=7235 .

This module is clearly not ready to being deployed on a production machine.
In hindsight this should have been clear from the start as the PG schema files distributed with 3.4.1 were horribly wrong (just a copy of the MySQL files...)

So i think as stated in my last comment this should be fixed overall in upstream.
Sorry for the noise, i thought we could get this to work.
